name: 高父

appearance.face: 中年方脸，皱纹渐增，表情严肃关切
appearance.distinguishing_features: 眼角增多皱纹与慈父关切神情

visual_reference: Middle-aged Chinese official mid-50s, square face with increasing wrinkles and kind yet serious eyes, graying hair under official hat, wearing dark purple fourth-rank hanfu robes, protective fatherly expression, ancient Chinese setting, highly detailed masterpiece
personality: 疼爱女儿、谨慎官场、最终护女果断
desire: 女儿平安喜乐、家族平安
flaw: 最初犹豫门第，后坚决护女
arc: 起点：劝嫁担忧 → 转变：辞官护女、拒沈家要孙女 → 终点：江南安排赘婿
scene_presence: 提亲时、劝辞官、拒沈母、和离书、江南安排赘婿
